violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as shell and liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as fruit and vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Raw animal foods were moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Sliced deli meats and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Establishment placed date of opening/slicing on food items during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Imitation crab meat was observed thawed with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items packaged in ROP shall be removed from their original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food item was observed at 36 degrees Fahrenheit and was removed from its packaging during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Various packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, list of allergens, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Chicken was observed held at 132 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken was only in unit for 1 hour, chicken was reheated to 165 degrees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the sales floor, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the low boy cooler in the deli. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing located in the kitchen New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
